label: LocalAGI
description: LocalAGI — self-hostable AI agent platform (mudler). Comes with a LocalAI companion; set LOCALAGI_MODEL to a model your LocalAI has pulled (scaffold — provide/pull the model).

label: LocalRecall
description: LocalRecall — local RAG / long-term memory server (mudler, pairs with LocalAI).

label: Open WebUI
description: Open WebUI — chat UI for Ollama / OpenAI-compatible backends. Point OLLAMA_BASE_URL / OPENAI_API_BASE_URL at your model resource.

label: ComfyUI
description: ComfyUI — node-based Stable Diffusion image/video pipeline (ai-dock build). GPU recommended.

label: SD.Next
description: SD.Next — all-in-one WebUI for generative image/video (vladmandic). CUDA image shown; ROCm/IPEX/OpenVINO variants exist. GPU recommended.

label: ACE-Step (music)
description: ACE-Step 1.5 — open music generation (Gradio UI, models baked in ~15GB). GPU recommended.

label: Langflow
description: Langflow — visual builder for LangChain-style LLM flows and agents. Superuser seeded (admin/admin — change it).

label: Flowise
description: Flowise — drag-and-drop LLM app / agent builder.

label: Whisper ASR
description: Whisper ASR web service — speech-to-text HTTP API (openai-whisper / faster-whisper).

label: code-server
description: code-server — VS Code in the browser. Login password seeded as a parameter (change it); without it code-server generates a random one each start.

label: Uptime Kuma
description: Uptime Kuma — self-hosted uptime/status monitoring.

label: Paperclip AI
description: Paperclip (paperclipai) — open platform for orchestrating AI agents. API on 3100; embedded Postgres, no DB setup needed. BETTER_AUTH_SECRET seeded as a parameter (change it).

label: Paperless-AI
description: Paperless-AI — AI companion for Paperless-ngx: auto tagging/classification + semantic search. Point it at your Paperless instance.

label: Paperless-ngx
description: Paperless-ngx — scan/OCR document management. Comes with a Postgres + Redis companion (scaffold — finish the connection env).

label: Nextcloud
description: Nextcloud — self-hosted files, calendar, collaboration.

label: Vaultwarden
description: Vaultwarden — lightweight Bitwarden-compatible password manager server.

label: Gitea
description: Gitea — lightweight self-hosted Git service.

label: Metabase
description: Metabase — BI dashboards & ad-hoc analytics over your databases.

label: Jaeger
description: Jaeger — distributed tracing UI + collector (OTLP). All-in-one, in-memory storage.

label: Homepage
description: Homepage — a sleek, configurable start page/dashboard for your services. HOMEPAGE_ALLOWED_HOSTS=* (dev) so it doesn't reject the Aspire host; config volume so /app/config exists.

label: OnlyOffice
description: OnlyOffice Document Server — a document-editing BACKEND (API), not a standalone app. The welcome/test page is expected; it's meant to be embedded in Nextcloud/your app, no user UI of its own.

label: Gokapi
description: Gokapi — lightweight self-hosted file sharing with expiring links.

label: Stirling-PDF
description: Stirling-PDF — local, privacy-friendly PDF toolbox (merge/split/OCR/convert…).

label: Actual Budget
description: Actual — fast, local-first personal budgeting/finance.

label: IT-Tools
description: IT-Tools — a big box of handy dev utilities (encoders, converters, generators…).

label: ntfy
description: ntfy — simple pub/sub push notifications to your phone/desktop via HTTP. Runs the 'serve' subcommand (bare ntfy just prints help and exits).

label: FreshRSS
description: FreshRSS — self-hosted RSS feed aggregator/reader.

label: Immich
description: Immich — self-hosted photo & video backup. Comes with Immich's VectorChord Postgres + Redis + the ML container (scaffold — add a media library volume as needed).

label: Dockge
description: Dockge — a tidy manager for docker-compose stacks (by the Uptime-Kuma author).

label: Dozzle
description: Dozzle — real-time Docker container log viewer in the browser. Bind-mounts the host Docker socket (read-only) to read container logs.

label: Jellyfin
description: Jellyfin — free media server (movies/TV/music). Mount your media as volumes; GPU for transcoding.

label: Navidrome
description: Navidrome — self-hosted music streaming (Subsonic-compatible).

label: Audiobookshelf
description: Audiobookshelf — audiobook & podcast server.

label: PhotoPrism
description: PhotoPrism — AI-powered photo gallery/backup. Login admin / please-change-me (change it).

label: Sonarr
description: Sonarr — TV series collection manager (needs a download client + indexer).

label: Radarr
description: Radarr — movie collection manager (pairs with Prowlarr + qBittorrent).

label: Prowlarr
description: Prowlarr — indexer manager for the *arr apps.

label: qBittorrent
description: qBittorrent — torrent client with a web UI. Login admin / adminadmin (change it in the UI). Ships a qBittorrent.conf with seeded credentials + host-header/CSRF validation disabled so the WebUI isn't 'Unauthorized' behind Aspire. (qBittorrent reads creds from its config file, not env, so they can't be Aspire parameters.)

label: Pi-hole
description: Pi-hole — network-wide ad/tracker blocking DNS. Admin login password seeded as a parameter (change it). Also binds DNS on :53 (host port conflicts possible).

label: AdGuard Home
description: AdGuard Home — DNS-based ad/tracker blocking (setup UI on :3000, DNS on :53).

label: Nginx Proxy Manager
description: Nginx Proxy Manager — reverse proxy + Let's Encrypt with a friendly UI (admin on :81; proxies 80/443). Default login admin@example.com / changeme. Needs /data + /etc/letsencrypt volumes or it refuses to start.

label: Home Assistant
description: Home Assistant — open-source home automation. Works best on host networking for device discovery.

label: Node-RED
description: Node-RED — low-code flow automation / event wiring.

label: Vikunja
description: Vikunja — self-hosted to-do / task & project management. CORS disabled (single container); runs as root so it can create its files dir (image runs as uid 1000 but /app/vikunja is root-owned).

label: Memos
description: Memos — lightweight, privacy-first note/memo hub.

label: Excalidraw
description: Excalidraw — hand-drawn-style whiteboard/diagrams.

label: Draw.io
description: Draw.io (diagrams.net) — full diagram editor, self-hosted. HTTP 400 'Request header is too large' = too many localhost cookies from other apps on other ports (Tomcat's 8KB limit); open it in a private window or clear localhost cookies.

label: AnythingLLM
description: AnythingLLM — all-in-one RAG/chat over your docs with any LLM.

label: LibreChat
description: LibreChat — polished multi-model chat UI. Comes with Mongo + Meilisearch companions (scaffold — finish the connection env).

label: SearXNG
description: SearXNG — private meta-search engine; great as a web-search tool for agents/RAG.

label: Bazarr
description: Bazarr — companion to Sonarr/Radarr that manages & downloads subtitles.

label: Jellyseerr
description: Jellyseerr — media request & discovery frontend for Jellyfin/Emby/Plex.

label: Jackett
description: Jackett — indexer proxy that translates tracker searches for the *arr apps.

label: Deluge
description: Deluge — lightweight BitTorrent client with a web UI (default password 'deluge', change it).

label: Komga
description: Komga — self-hosted comics/manga/e-book server.

label: Kavita
description: Kavita — fast, cross-platform reading server (comics, manga, books).

label: Calibre-Web
description: Calibre-Web — clean web UI to browse/read/download your Calibre e-book library (login admin / admin123).

label: File Browser
description: File Browser — a tidy web file manager for a directory (login admin / admin, change it).

label: Heimdall
description: Heimdall — a good-looking application dashboard / start page for your services.

label: Homer
description: Homer — a dead-simple static homepage/dashboard for your services (edit assets/config.yml).

label: Duplicati
description: Duplicati — encrypted, scheduled backups to local/cloud storage.

label: Gotify
description: Gotify — simple self-hosted server for push notifications (login admin / admin, change it).

label: Grocy
description: Grocy — ERP for your fridge: groceries, stock, chores & recipes (login admin / admin).

label: LibreTranslate
description: LibreTranslate — self-hosted machine translation API/UI (downloads language models on first start).

label: LobeChat
description: LobeChat — polished chat UI for OpenAI/Claude/Ollama and more (enter your API keys in-app).

label: Grafana
description: Grafana — dashboards & visualization over your metrics/logs (login admin / admin).

label: Glances
description: Glances — a cross-platform system monitor with a web UI. Runs in web-server mode; bind-mounts the Docker socket (read-only) to show container stats.

label: Portainer
description: Portainer — web UI to manage Docker/containers. Bind-mounts the host Docker socket. Set the admin password on first visit.

label: NocoDB
description: NocoDB — turn any database into a smart spreadsheet (Airtable-style). SQLite by default, no DB setup needed.

label: Mealie
description: Mealie — self-hosted recipe manager & meal planner (SQLite by default).

label: Homebox
description: Homebox — simple home inventory & organization (SQLite). Needs an API-key pepper (>= 32 bytes) — seeded as a parameter; rotating it invalidates issued API keys.

label: linkding
description: linkding — minimal, fast self-hosted bookmark manager. Seeds an admin user (change the password).

label: Shiori
description: Shiori — simple bookmarks manager (Pocket-like). First-run login is shiori / gopher — change it after logging in (Shiori has no env for initial credentials). SHIORI_HTTP_SECRET_KEY seeded as a parameter so sessions survive restarts.

label: changedetection.io
description: changedetection.io — watch web pages for changes and get notified. (Add a Playwright/browserless companion later for JS-heavy pages.)

label: CyberChef
description: CyberChef — the 'Cyber Swiss-Army knife' for encoding, encryption and data analysis (static web app).

label: Dashy
description: Dashy — a highly configurable, good-looking dashboard for your self-hosted services.

label: Filestash
description: Filestash — a web file manager frontend for S3/FTP/SFTP/WebDAV and more.

label: Syncthing
description: Syncthing — continuous, peer-to-peer file synchronization (web UI on 8384).

label: Wallos
description: Wallos — self-hosted subscription tracker & budget overview (SQLite).

label: Whoogle
description: Whoogle — private, ad-free Google search proxy (no JS, no tracking).

label: LibreSpeed
description: LibreSpeed — self-hosted network speed test (no Flash/Java, single container).

label: Overseerr
description: Overseerr — media request & discovery for Plex (Radarr/Sonarr integration).

label: Tautulli
description: Tautulli — monitoring & analytics for a Plex Media Server.

label: FlareSolverr
description: FlareSolverr — proxy that solves Cloudflare challenges for indexers (Prowlarr/Jackett). HTTP API, no real UI.

label: Firefly III
description: Firefly III — self-hosted personal finance manager. Comes with a Postgres companion. APP_KEY must stay exactly 32 chars.

label: Wiki.js
description: Wiki.js — modern, powerful wiki. Postgres companion included.

label: Linkwarden
description: Linkwarden — collaborative bookmark & web-archive manager. Postgres companion. Set NEXTAUTH_URL to how you reach it (default localhost:3000).

label: BookStack
description: BookStack — simple, self-hosted documentation/wiki. MariaDB companion. APP_KEY is required (base64:<32 bytes>) — seeded as a parameter. Set APP_URL to how you reach it (default http://localhost). Login admin@admin.com / password.

label: HedgeDoc
description: HedgeDoc — real-time collaborative markdown notes. Postgres companion. Set CMD_DOMAIN to your host (default localhost) — CMD_URL_ADDPORT keeps the port in links.

label: Tandoor Recipes
description: Tandoor — feature-rich recipe manager & meal planner. Postgres companion.

label: Ghost
description: Ghost — professional publishing / blog platform. MySQL companion (Ghost 5 requires MySQL). Set url to how you reach it (default localhost:2368).

label: Planka
description: Planka — Trello-style kanban boards. Postgres companion. Set BASE_URL to how you reach it (default localhost:1337). Default login demo@demo.demo / demo.

label: Plex
description: Plex Media Server — movies/TV/music. Open the UI at http://<host>:32400/web (the bare URL returns "Bad Request"). Published on fixed port 32400. Optional PLEX_CLAIM (from plex.tv/claim, ~4 min) links your account. ALLOWED_NETWORKS lets your LAN in; GPU for transcoding.

label: Emby
description: Emby Media Server — movies/TV/music. Create the admin account via the first-run wizard. Mount your media; GPU for transcoding.

label: Lidarr
description: Lidarr — music collection manager for the *arr stack (pairs with Prowlarr + a download client).

label: Mattermost
description: Mattermost — self-hosted team chat (Slack alternative). Postgres companion. Create the admin account on first run.

label: Outline
description: Outline — team wiki/knowledge base. Postgres + Redis companions. GOTCHA: needs an auth provider (OIDC/Google/Slack env) to sign in — no built-in local login. Set URL to how you reach it.

label: Ghostfolio
description: Ghostfolio — open-source wealth/portfolio tracker. Postgres + Redis companions. Create your account in-app. ACCESS_TOKEN_SALT & JWT_SECRET_KEY seeded as params (change them).

label: LibrePhotos
description: LibrePhotos — self-hosted photo management with AI tagging & face recognition (unified build, SQLite). Heavy first-run indexing, ~4GB RAM. Admin from params (admin / please-change-me).

label: DocuSeal
description: DocuSeal — open-source document signing (DocuSign alternative). SQLite by default (set DATABASE_URL for Postgres/MySQL). Create the admin account on first visit.

label: Penpot
description: Penpot — open-source design & prototyping (Figma alternative). Frontend + backend + exporter + Postgres + Redis. Register the first account in-app. Set PENPOT_PUBLIC_URI to how you reach it.

label: Homarr
description: Homarr — modern, customizable dashboard for your services. Requires SECRET_ENCRYPTION_KEY (64 hex) or it exits — seeded as a parameter (rotating it invalidates stored integration secrets).

label: Homebridge
description: Homebridge — bridge non-HomeKit devices into Apple HomeKit; config UI on :8581 (create admin on first visit). Host networking for HomeKit discovery (won't work under Docker Desktop).

label: OctoPrint
description: OctoPrint — web control & monitoring for a 3D printer. Starts into the setup wizard; to print, pass the printer's serial device.

label: ESPHome
description: ESPHome — build & flash firmware for ESP32/ESP8266 from a web dashboard. Host networking helps mDNS/OTA; USB flashing needs the device passed in.

label: Frigate NVR
description: Frigate — NVR with realtime object detection. Ships a minimal config.yml (no cameras, auth/tls off) so it starts; add cameras + a detector (Coral/GPU). Raise /dev/shm for multiple cameras.

files.name: frigate/config.yml
files.content:
mqtt:
  enabled: false
auth:
  enabled: false
tls:
  enabled: false

label: MeTube
description: MeTube — self-hosted web UI for yt-dlp; download video/audio from YouTube and hundreds of sites.

label: InfluxDB v2
description: InfluxDB 2 — time-series DB + UI. Auto first-time setup (org aspireui, bucket default); admin user/password + admin API token seeded as params (password >= 8 chars).

label: MinIO
description: MinIO — S3-compatible object storage; console on :9001 (S3 API :9000). Pinned to the last release with a full browser console. Root user/password seeded as params (>= 8 chars).

label: Etherpad
description: Etherpad — real-time collaborative document editor (built-in dirtyDB; add a DB for scale). Admin UI (/admin) login admin + the seeded ADMIN_PASSWORD.

label: JupyterLab
description: JupyterLab — notebooks for data science / Python. Access needs the token (?token=...), seeded as a parameter. Use scipy/datascience image variants for more libs.

label: ArchiveBox
description: ArchiveBox — self-hosted web archive/bookmarking (HTML, PDF, screenshots). Create an admin login with 'archivebox manage createsuperuser' in the container.

label: autobrr
description: autobrr — real-time download automation from IRC announce + RSS into the *arr apps / download clients. Create the account on first visit.

label: Baikal
description: Baikal — lightweight CalDAV + CardDAV server (calendars & contacts). Finish setup (admin + SQLite/MySQL) via the web installer on first visit.

label: flatnotes
description: flatnotes — database-less markdown notes over a flat folder. Username/password + session secret seeded as params.

label: LinkStack
description: LinkStack — self-hosted 'link in bio' page. Complete admin + setup via the web wizard on first run.

label: MySpeed
description: MySpeed — scheduled internet speed-test monitoring with history/graphs. Set an access password in the UI after first launch.

label: Cosmos Server
description: Cosmos — self-hosted reverse proxy + app manager with auth/anti-DDOS (:80 / :443). Bind-mounts the Docker socket; complete the setup wizard on first visit. Meant to sit at the network edge.

label: electrs
description: Rust Electrum server (romanz/electrs). Needs a local Bitcoin Core node with txindex — reads the blocks dir + points at its RPC.

label: Fulcrum
description: Fulcrum — fast SPV/Electrum server for BTC/BCH/LTC. Requires an external Bitcoin Core node with RPC + txindex; configure via a mounted fulcrum.conf. SSL on 50002.

label: ElectrumX
description: ElectrumX server (env-configurable). Requires an external Bitcoin Core node with txindex; set DAEMON_URL to its RPC.

label: BTC RPC Explorer
description: Self-hosted Bitcoin block explorer (janoside). Needs a Bitcoin Core RPC; an Electrum server (electrs/Fulcrum) is optional for address balances.

label: mempool
description: mempool.space self-hosted explorer/visualizer. Frontend + backend + MariaDB. Point the backend at an external Bitcoin Core (CORE_RPC_*) and Electrum server (ELECTRUM_HOST).

label: LNbits
description: LNbits — Lightning wallet/accounts system with extensions. Starts on a VoidWallet (demo); switch LNBITS_BACKEND_WALLET_CLASS to LND/CLN and add its env to go live.

label: Core Lightning
description: Core Lightning (CLN) node daemon. Requires a Bitcoin Core backend — set --bitcoin-rpc* flags or mount a config; no UI of its own.

label: Ride The Lightning
description: RTL — web UI for LND / Core Lightning / Eclair nodes. Needs an existing LN node: mount its macaroon + point RTLConfig at the node.

label: Bitcoin Knots
description: Bitcoin Knots full node (drop-in for Bitcoin Core). Runs standalone and starts IBD; RPC on 8332, P2P on 8333.

label: Bitcoin Cash Node
description: Bitcoin Cash (BCHN) full node. Runs standalone as a daemon and starts IBD; RPC on 8332, P2P on 8333.

label: LeafWiki
description: LeafWiki — lightweight self-hosted wiki (single Go binary + SQLite, Markdown on disk). Set ALLOW_INSECURE=true for plain HTTP.

label: Transmute
description: Transmute — self-hosted file converter/compressor (images, video, audio, docs). Runs entirely locally.

label: Foldergram
description: Foldergram — self-hosted folder-based photo/video gallery. Point volumes at your media.

label: Runtipi
description: Runtipi — self-hosted homeserver / app manager. EXPERIMENTAL here: it is itself a Docker orchestrator (mounts the Docker socket, runs its own Traefik on :80 + bundled Postgres/Redis) and normally installs via its own setup script — running it inside AspireUI stacks two managers on one Docker daemon. It wants to own the box.

label: Umbrel (umbrelOS)
description: umbrelOS via the community dockurr/umbrel wrapper — there is NO official Umbrel container image (official install is a script onto Debian/Ubuntu/RaspberryPiOS). EXPERIMENTAL: umbrelOS is itself an orchestrator, so nesting it stacks two managers on one Docker daemon. Needs the Docker socket + host PID.

label: Hermes Agent
description: Hermes Agent (Nous Research) — AI agent gateway with a dashboard. Standalone the app-proxy auth is OFF (HERMES_UMBREL_APP_PROXY_AUTH=0) so the dashboard is UNAUTHENTICATED — put it behind your own auth / a trusted network. Supply model API keys in-app.

label: OpenClaw
description: OpenClaw — AI 'does-things' agent with a bundled headless browser + control UI. APP_SEED (identity/encryption) seeded as a parameter — keep it stable or state is lost. Model provider key set in-app.

label: Joinstr
description: Joinstr — Nostr-based coinjoin wallet UI. Requires an external Bitcoin Core node over RPC (set the RPC params) — useless without a node.

label: PearCircle Seeder
description: PearCircle Seeder — always-on seeder companion for the PearCircle phone app (P2P sharing). Dashboard on :8730; only useful once you enroll a circle from the phone app. SEEDER_NO_AUTH=1 = no login (put behind your own auth).

label: Bitcoin Seed Tool
description: Bitcoin Seed Tool — offline BIP39 seed / education tool. Fully standalone. WARNING: educational only — never use it for seeds protecting real funds.

label: SkyBro
description: SkyBro — overhead flight tracker with alerts (uses OpenSky/Open-Meteo, no API key). Ships a tracker companion; both share /data on Umbrel — our companion can't share the volume yet, so the dashboard may show empty until that's wired. Home coords + Pushover/Discord set in-app.

label: ValorGrid
description: ValorGrid — local-first SQLite portfolio tracker. Set an auth password (params); add an Alpha Vantage API key for live market prices.
